chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2720 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.12550/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.10.2025 Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG. ------------- This petition was last taken up on 03.06.2024, which is nearly one and a half years ago. In the last one and a half years, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today despite the lapse of nearly one and a half years none present for the petitioners without intimation, though the name of the petitioners are appearing in the cause list. It appears that the petitioners have lost their interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
